title: Eval Calibration: Extend to 60-80 Samples + Run
description: Extend eval dataset from 43 to 60-80 samples with focus on semantic/coarse types. Run eval with evidence gate enabled (threshold=0.0) to capture score distributions. CRITICAL: Must acknowledge retrieval-state.md Phase 1B-B GATE NOT PASSED status.
acceptance_criteria: New samples include 15-20 semantic rephrasings and 10-15 coarse summaries
Eval run captures post-rerank Citation.score per sample (not Qdrant raw)
Score distribution report generated per query type (exact/fine/semantic/coarse)
Results include threshold candidate analysis (conservative_95, balanced, aggressive)
Eval run references bundle_id from frozen bundle
retrieval-state.md GATE NOT PASSED status acknowledged in eval report
No modification to retrieval_service.py or any retrieval internals
implementation_steps: 0. MANDATORY READS: Read ALL retrieval mandatory reads listed in agents_compliance.mandatory_reads BEFORE any code changes
1. Read .agent/context/retrieval-state.md and acknowledge Phase 1B-B GATE NOT PASSED
2. Read eval/README.md, eval/retrieval_samples.yaml, scripts/eval_retrieval.py for current eval structure
3. Design new eval samples: semantic rephrasings, coarse summaries, anti-patterns
5. Enhance run_retrieval_eval.py to capture post-rerank Citation.score
6. Add score distribution reporting per query type
10. Document retrieval-state acknowledgment in eval report
11. /review: Review all changes before marking complete

agents_compliance.reason: Touches eval domain which triggers Retrieval auto-enforcement per AGENTS.md § 自动触发规则 §1: 'eval/README.md, eval/retrieval_samples.yaml, scripts/eval_retrieval.py' are listed as retrieval patterns. NOT Lite Mode eligible.

key_constraints: eval instability: conservative_trigger_count oscillates 1-11 across runs
cross-013 department_sufficient misjudgment not fully resolved
HNSW non-determinism causes boundary case oscillation
retrieval_state_acknowledgment.scope_limitation: This task EXTENDS eval samples and adds score capture to the eval script. It does NOT modify retrieval_service.py, reranker, router, chunk, or any retrieval internals. The eval script modification only adds score distribution reporting.
prohibited_actions: Do not claim eval is calibrated if results are still unstable
Do not enter Phase 2B chunk implementation
Do not modify existing samples to hide problems

brain_tasks: Review retrieval-state.md constraints before approving sample design
Validate sample design against known blind spots (threshold boundary, lexical edge, cross-dept)
Review eval results for stability concerns
Decide if eval results are sufficient to proceed to IMPL-007
executor_tasks: Create new eval samples in retrieval_samples_v2.yaml
Enhance eval script for score capture
